backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a JobListing type with Position variants, a mutable list of job listings, seed data initialization, and CRUD operations (addJob, getAllJobs, etc.) for an academic faculty job portal.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (multi-page routing, Home page, Jobs page) to their source files, component dependencies, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a reference summary for all components, pages, hooks, and config files in the project.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'ProfessorConnect' and mounting the app via a root div and module script pointing to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with four client-side routes (Home, Jobs, About, Contact) wrapped in a shared Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Three-column footer component with brand identity, quick navigation links, and contact info, plus a copyright line and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM parameters.
frontend/src/components/JobCard.tsx: Card component that displays a single job listing's institute, position badge (color-coded by rank), department, location, deadline (with closing-soon warning), and an Apply Now button linking to the institute URL.
frontend/src/components/JobFilters.tsx: Renders a filter bar for job listings with a search input and dropdowns for institute, department, location, and position, plus a reset button when filters are active.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with a sticky Navigation header and Footer, providing the base full-height flex layout for all pages.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with desktop links and a mobile hamburger menu, highlighting the active route and linking to the ProfessorConnect brand and job browsing.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all jobs, initializing the backend, and adding a new job listing via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines a comprehensive OKLCH-based CSS custom property color system for both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Static About page for ProfessorConnect describing the platform's mission, target users (PhD scholars, postdocs, etc.), and planned future features like AI job matching and CV upload.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a validated contact form (name, email, message) and simulated async submission, alongside static contact information display.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page that fetches all jobs to display live stats, and renders a hero section, feature highlights, and target user categories with links to the jobs listing page.
frontend/src/pages/Jobs.tsx: Jobs listing page that fetches all faculty positions and provides search/filter controls by institute, department, location, and position type, rendering results as job cards with loading skeletons and error states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom brand, nav, footer, and card color tokens using OKLCH CSS variables, custom fonts, shadows, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state for ProfessorConnect, a static academic job search site, including architecture notes, existing features, known issues, and image requirements at schema version 1.0.0.
